name: medical-coding
title: Medical Coding
description: Map clinical notes to ICD-10 / CPT codes with a strict no-invention gate. PHI redaction required upstream; output codes only, no diagnostic prose.
default_describe: Map clinical notes to ICD-10-CM and CPT codes. Output a JSON array of codes with rationale phrases lifted verbatim from the note. Never invent codes. If the note does not support a code, do not emit it.
